title: helictotrichon montanum subsp. velutinum
intro: Helictotrichon montanum subsp. velutinum, also known as velvet hair grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helictotrichon montanum subsp. velutinum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
